sql_array: CREATE TABLE employees (id BIGINT, name VARCHAR, department VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO employees (id, name, department) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 'HR'), (2, 'Bob', 'HR'), (3, 'Charlie', 'IT'), (4, 'David', 'IT');
CREATE TABLE sales (id BIGINT, employee_id BIGINT, amount DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO sales (id, employee_id, amount) VALUES (1, 1, 100.0), (2, 2, 150.0), (3, 1, 200.0), (4, 4, 300.0);
SELECT name, rank() OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY id) AS department_rank FROM employees;
